hooks._comment_security_audit: Session and tool execution lifecycle hooks for security auditing
hooks._comment_security_audit_description: Track when agent sessions start/end and log all tool invocations

postToolUse.command: echo "[$(date)] Tool execution completed: $TOOL_NAME with status: $TOOL_STATUS" >> agent-logs.txt

hooks._comment_automation: PR quality checks and automated code review hooks
hooks._comment_automation_description: Validate PRs with build/test and gather code review context automatically

prValidation.command: echo "[$(date)] PR validation started" >> agent-logs.txt; dotnet build LMSWebAPI.sln >> agent-logs.txt 2>&1; dotnet test LMSWebAPI.sln >> agent-logs.txt 2>&1; echo "[$(date)] PR validation completed" >> agent-logs.txt

autoCodeReview.command: echo "[$(date)] Auto code review started" >> agent-logs.txt; gh pr diff --name-only >> agent-logs.txt 2>&1; gh pr view --json title,number,author,additions,deletions,changedFiles >> agent-logs.txt 2>&1; echo "[$(date)] Auto code review completed" >> agent-logs.txt
